result.stderr:
RelaxVersioner [3.22.0-730dba34cd90935de37667e77680137380284b19] [2026.3.17.32649]
Usage: rv [options...] <projectDirectory>
  -l, --language=VALUE       target language [C++/CLI|C#|F#|NPM|Replace|Text|VB]
      --namespace=VALUE      applying namespace
      --tfm=VALUE            target framework moniker definition (
                               TargetFramework)
      --tfid=VALUE           target framework identity definition (
                               TargetFrameworkIdentifier)
      --tfv=VALUE            target framework version definition (
                               TargetFrameworkVersion)
      --tfp=VALUE            target framework profile definition (
                               TargetFrameworkProfile)
      --genStatic=VALUE      generate static informations
      --buildIdentifier=VALUE
                             build identifier
      --propertiesPath=VALUE properties file
      --globalPropertiesPath=VALUE
                             global properties file
      --projectPath=VALUE    MSBuild project file path
      --propertyCollectionMode=VALUE
                             property collection mode [Legacy|Selective|Compare]
      --propertyCollectionTarget=VALUE
                             property collection target name
      --msbuildRuntimeType=VALUE
                             MSBuild runtime type
      --msbuildBinPath=VALUE MSBuild bin path
  -o, --outputPath=VALUE     output source file
      --resultPath=VALUE     output result via xml file
  -f, --format=VALUE         set text format
  -r, --replace              replace standard input
  -i, --replaceInputPath=VALUE
                             replace input source file
      --bracket=VALUE        enable custom bracket
  -n, --npm                  replace NPM package.json
      --npmns=VALUE          NPM dependency prefix namespaces
  -w, --cwd                  check working directory status
      --quiet                quiet on stdout
      --dryrun               dryrun mode
      --verbose              verbose mode
      --launchDebugger       Launch debugger
      --help                 help

Supported languages: C#, C++/CLI, F#, NPM, Replace, Text, VB
